Records.description: 3-loop traintrack integral involving a K3 surface. 3-loop traintrack with 10 massless propagators, 12 massless external legs grouped into 8 momenta. Finite and dual-conformally invariant in $d=4$. Involves weight-4 hyperlogarithms integrated over a K3 surface, realized as a degree-12 hypersurface in weighted projective space $\mathbb{P}^3_{[1:1:4:6]}$. The K3 is a smooth semi-stable elliptic surface of Picard number 2 with Weierstrass discriminant of degree 24 in the fiber parameter. Singular fibers all of Kodaira type $I_n$.
Records.location: Eq. (1), Sec. Geometry of the Elliptic Fibration

Records.description: Traintrack family, traintrack_L3_massless-internal-offshell-external. Planar chain of L boxes (cells), massless internal lines. External legs at every vertex: 4 off-shell corners (distinct masses, the collapsed pairs of the paper's 2L+6 massless particles) + 2L-2 massless middle legs; L=1 is the four-mass box. The L-loop traintrack is a weight-(L+1) hyperlogarithm over a Calabi-Yau (L-1)-fold: L=1 is a box, L=2 elliptic, L=3 a K3 surface, L=4 a Calabi-Yau threefold.
